parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "pipeline": "claims",
  "claim_id": "{{ $json.claim_id }}",
  "action": "{{ $json.action }}",
  "classification": "{{ $('Apply Orchestrator Logic').first().json.classification }}",
  "priority": "{{ $('Apply Orchestrator Logic').first().json.priority }}",
  "confidence": {{ $('Apply Orchestrator Logic').first().json.confidence }},
  "fraud_score": {{ $('Apply Orchestrator Logic').first().json.fraud_score }},
  "final_route": "{{ $('Apply Orchestrator Logic').first().json.final_route }}",
  "orchestrator_override": {{ $('Apply Orchestrator Logic').first().json.orchestrator_override }},
  "logged_at": "{{ $now }}"
}
